items.title: The Russian Drone That Hit Romania Also Hit European Confidence
items.summary: The failure to protect NATO territory further increased anxiety about alliance solidarity, Russia’s intentions and Washington’s commitment to collective defense.

items.title: Myanmar's Min Aung Hlaing takes first foreign tour as leader, with visit to India
items.summary: The tour comes as Myanmar's new government tries to consolidate its political position regionally, while continuing to wage a brutal civil war.
